title: Creamy Garlic Chicken Tagine
description: A rich and flavorful French-inspired chicken tagine, made with a creamy garlic sauce and served with a side of crusty bread.
instructions: 1. Heat the oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
2. Add the garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
3. Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
4. Add the berbere spice and cook for 1 minute.
5. Add the chicken broth, heavy cream, and garlic paste. Stir to combine.
6. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Serve the chicken and sauce hot, garnished with fresh parsley.
